title: OCC HOTLINE - 211info
text: OREGON CHINESE COALITION OCC HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a support line for Chinese community members in crisis situations, including being a victim of a crime, being lost in the streets, receiving an eviction notice, experiencing depression and needing to talk with someone, or needing interpretation services. The support line is for urgent situations only. In most cases, the support will be provided remotely. 219 NW 3rd Avenue #227 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Chinese community members in crisis or urgent situations Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week, though service hours may vary based on volunteer availability Email (503) 334-1010 , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (503) 334-1010 English, Mandarin Hotline (503) 334-0438 Cantonese Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for assistance FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Cantonese, English, Mandarin AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Chinese Community Language Interpretation * Chinese Community Mental Health Crisis Lines * Chinese Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON CHINESE COALITION
